rows.name: facilitator_message_user_family
rows.value:
**Thank you @fields.user_name.**
 
Can you tell us a bit about your family? This helps us share the right tips for you.

rows.name: question_household_children
rows.value: How many children do you care for in your home?

rows.name: household_children_input_restriction
rows.value: Please enter a number between 1 and 20.
